title: Yanai Lakshmi (Elephant Lakshmi) Tanjore Painting
description: The Yanai Lakshmi (Elephant Lakshmi) Tanjore Painting is a unique and captivating piece of art that blends the symbolism of Goddess Lakshmi with the grandeur of elephants. This artwork highlights her divine presence and the blessings she brings to devotees.

features.title: Goddess Lakshmi with Elephants
features.description: Depicts Goddess Lakshmi seated on a lotus, surrounded by majestic elephants symbolizing wisdom, power, and prosperity.

features.title: Gold Foil Detailing
features.description: Rich gold foil work highlights ornaments and divine features, adding shimmer and spiritual grandeur.

features.title: Embossed & Semi-Embossed Work
features.description: Raised techniques create depth and a three-dimensional effect in attire, elephants, and lotus.

features.title: Vibrant Color Palette
features.description: Uses rich shades of red, gold, green, and blue to enhance divine and majestic appeal.

symbolism.title: Goddess Lakshmi
symbolism.description: Symbol of wealth, prosperity, and good fortune, often associated with purity and abundance.

symbolism.title: Elephants
symbolism.description: Represent wisdom, strength, good luck, and removal of obstacles.

symbolism.title: Lotus Flower
symbolism.description: Symbolizes purity, beauty, and spiritual enlightenment.

careInstructions: Avoid direct sunlight to preserve colors and gold foil
Clean gently with a soft, dry cloth
